summary: W1474 refines the W1473 W987 construction by replacing the object strict-preimage data family with eight object-level fields: zero and one source objects, zero and one comparison isomorphisms, left and right source maps, and left and right factorization laws. It reconstructs the object strict-preimage data family, feeds the resulting W1473 input, and lets W1473/W1472 reconstruct the raw and normalized lift blueprints while reassembling W519, W973, W945, W730, W986, and W987. Product success remains false because no positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess witness exists and the final imported original four-task completion surface still proves productSuccessClaimed=false.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: ProductSuccessDeclarations.lean does not import or check an OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the four original tasks.
Final imported completion surface remains nonterminal: originalFourTaskContractCompletion.productSuccessClaimed = false still compiles.

Original four mathematical tasks remain open under the positive-witness supplement; W1474 reconstructs the W987 route from fifty-one assumed inputs, including raw boundary fields, raw relation fields, target-difference surjectivity and target-codomain compact no-univ membership primitive families, three W714 selected-difference closed-embedding diagram component fields, a raw mapped explicit cokernel closed-embedding field, eight normalized-lift object strict-preimage fields, normalized-lift map strict-preimage data plus identity and composition laws for the lift blueprint, fixed-target uniqueness, source-triangulation fields, endpoint kernel/cokernel-top fields, localized right-adjoint object and morphism maps plus identity and composition laws, localized adjunction unit/counit component and naturality fields, localized adjunction left/right triangle component identity fields, unit-mapping-cone kernel/cokernel-top fields, and unit-mapping-cone iso hom/inv/identity fields rather than proving those inputs from a positive product witness.
remaining_work: Continue Lean implementation toward a positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess-style declaration backed by actual exact-category, metrizable LCA exact-category, Yoneda-Ext, and bounded derived infinity-category constructions.

Discharge the W1474 raw W716/W717 fields, target-difference surjectivity primitive family, target-codomain compact no-univ membership primitive family, three W714 selected-difference closed-embedding diagram component fields, raw mapped explicit cokernel closed-embedding field, normalized-lift zero source object family, normalized-lift one source object family, normalized-lift zero comparison isomorphism family, normalized-lift one comparison isomorphism family, normalized-lift left source map family, normalized-lift right source map family, normalized-lift left factorization law family, normalized-lift right factorization law family, normalized-lift map strict-preimage data family, normalized-lift map identity law, normalized-lift map composition law, normalized-lift object-image normalization, normalized-lift map-image normalization, fixed-target uniqueness, source-pretriangulated, source-triangulated, triangle-completion, endpoint closed-embedding, endpoint open-map, endpoint cokernel-top, endpoint kernel-equality, localized right-adjoint object map, localized right-adjoint morphism map, localized right-adjoint identity law, localized right-adjoint composition law, localized adjunction unit component family, localized adjunction unit naturality, localized adjunction counit component family, localized adjunction counit naturality, localized adjunction left triangle component identity, localized adjunction right triangle component identity, unit-mapping-cone model, unit-mapping-cone closed-embedding, unit-mapping-cone open-map, unit-mapping-cone cokernel-top, unit-mapping-cone kernel-equality, unit-mapping-cone iso hom, unit-mapping-cone iso inv, unit-mapping-cone iso hom-inv, and unit-mapping-cone iso inv-hom inputs with real Lean constructions satisfying the positive-witness supplement, or replace them with an explicit positive witness.
Before any product-success claim, rerun the source-contradiction gate, negative fixtures, clean checkout verification, root external audit, and clean-extracted packet audit.
